subject: fix(theme): close dropdown on mode toggle, validate theme IDs, sync warning
body:
Three fixes from code review:

1. ThemeSelector.jsx: Dropdown now auto-closes when isDark changes.
   Previously stayed open showing a jarring theme list swap.

2. useDarkMode.js: All theme IDs validated against catalog arrays.
   Invalid/garbage values from localStorage or cross-tab sync fall
   back to defaults instead of producing unstyled pages. Prevents
   cross-mode mismatch (light theme ID stored as darkTheme).
   Validation at: init, setters, and storage event handler.

3. index.html: Added SYNC WARNING comment explaining that the flash
   script hardcodes defaults that must match daisyuiThemes.js. Inline
   scripts can't import ES modules so duplication is unavoidable.

Tags: theme, bugfix, validation, a11y
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
